title: Preparing the Merry for the Sky
description: Cricket’s obsession with the lost city of gold and his ancestor’s disgrace gives the Sky Island search emotional weight.
scene: Across pages 18, 19, 20, 21, this scene centers on Usopp, Mont Blanc Cricket, Masira, Shojo, Luffy. Cricket’s obsession with the lost city of gold and his ancestor’s disgrace gives the Sky Island search emotional weight.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: usopp! Get Luffy outta the water!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The seas around here are my territory.

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: You've come for my gold, haven't you?

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: Over my dead body, you will...

summary: Cricket’s obsession with the lost city of gold and his ancestor’s disgrace gives the Sky Island search emotional weight.
